sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22777" key="grammisth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γραμμ-ιστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n22777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a surgical instrument, Hermes</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.281</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
